title: cymbidium × woodlandense
intro: Cymbidium × woodlandense is a rare and unique intergeneric hybrid orchid, resulting from the cross between Cymbidium and Coelogyne species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium × woodlandense include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and enhance the body's natural defenses.
